SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS SUN SIK KIM AND CHONG KIM. GRACE YANG WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS KOREAN SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT DOUGLAS GEORGE LINDT AND DEFENDANT BAY CITES ICE, LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE BRUCE WISECARVER. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS GEORGE LINDT, ONLY. DEFENDANT BAY CITIES ICE, LLC WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KIM, SUN SIK KIM, CHONG K AS TO DEFENDANT LINDT, DOUGLAS GEORGE BAY CITIES ICE, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, SUN SIK KIM, CHONG K IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LINDT, DOUGLAS GEORGE BAY CITIES ICE, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
